sentences.arabic: عُمَرُ بْنُ الْخَطَّابِ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ كَانَ مَعْرُوفًا بِعَدْلِهِ وَزُهْدِهِ.
sentences.translation: Omer ibn el-Hattab, radijallahu anhu, bio je poznat po svojoj pravednosti i skromnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Umar ibn al-Khattab, may Allah be pleased with him, was known for his justice and asceticism.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ كَانَ خَلِيفَةً، كَانَ يَخْرُجُ لَيْلًا لِيَتَفَقَّدَ أَحْوَالَ النَّاسِ وَيَحْمِلَ الطَّعَامَ لِلْفُقَرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Dok je bio halifa, izlazio je noću da provjeri stanje naroda i nosio hranu siromasima.
sentences.translationEn: When he was caliph, he would go out at night to check on the condition of the people and carry food to the poor.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي عُمَرَ: «لَوْ كَانَ بَعْدِي نَبِيٌّ لَكَانَ عُمَرَ» [رَوَاهُ التِّرْمِذِيُّ وَصَحَّحَهُ الْأَلْبَانِيُّ].
sentences.translation: Poslanik je rekao o Omeru: 'Da je iza mene trebao biti nabi, bio bi Omer.'
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet said about Umar: 'If there were to be a prophet after me, it would have been Umar.'

sentences.arabic: يُعَلِّمُنَا عُمَرُ أَنَّ الْقِيَادَةَ الصَّادِقَةَ تَعْنِي خِدْمَةَ النَّاسِ وَالِاهْتِمَامَ بِأَحْوَالِهِمْ، لَا التَّرَفُّعَ عَلَيْهِمْ.
sentences.translation: [Bilježi Tirmizi, vjerodostojnim ga ocijenio Albani] Omer nas uči da istinsko vodstvo znači služenje narodu i brigu o njihovim prilikama, a ne uzdizanje iznad njih.
sentences.translationEn: [Narrated by al-Tirmidhi, authenticated by al-Albani] Umar teaches us that true leadership means serving people and caring for their welfare, not elevating oneself above them.
